lambs.name: Lambs
lambs.notes: First protected client-dashboard fixture. Used to prove generic client portal access control and dashboard rendering.

2026-04.methodology: DayDine RCS v3.4.1 — V4 official-source mode with deterministic tie-breaks

headline.public_visibility: Inside the public top 30 overall and category top 30
headline.tracking_status: Strong public visibility; protect position and monitor nearby score clusters.

components.name: Trust & Compliance
components.summary: Trust & Compliance is strong. There is no immediate compliance-led commercial concern, but inspection recency and management-confidence signals should remain protected.

components.name: Customer Validation
components.summary: Strong Google evidence, but still single-platform. A second authorised customer-platform source would improve evidence breadth and confidence.

components.name: Commercial Readiness
components.summary: Website, menu and opening hours are visible, but a direct booking/contact path is not fully confirmed in the public record.
components.evidence: Website present · menu checked · opening hours present

monthly_tracking.label: Monthly movement
monthly_tracking.meaning: Future snapshots can show up/down movement

priorities.title: Add a second customer-platform listing
priorities.why: Customer Validation is currently single-platform. A second authorised source would improve confidence and reduce reliance on Google alone.
priorities.evidence: Only Google is present as a customer platform in the current fixture.
priorities.action: Claim or strengthen an additional legitimate review/listing source where appropriate.
priorities.expected_upside: Raises the achievable confidence class toward Rankable-A.

priorities.title: Publish a reachable phone number or direct booking link
priorities.why: The booking/contact path is commercially important and not fully confirmed in the public record.
priorities.evidence: Public record does not show a fully confirmed direct booking/contact path.
priorities.action: Add a public phone number, direct reservation URL, or clear booking path to the main public listing.
priorities.expected_upside: Improves Commercial Readiness and reduces customer drop-off.

commercial_impact.wording_guardrail: Directional estimate only. Exact numbers require internal cover and spend data.

movement.summary: Baseline month — movement will appear after the next monthly snapshot.

operator_context.label: Operator intelligence view
operator_context.visibility: Inside the public top 30 overall and category top 30
operator_context.note: This is the report-aligned commercial/operator view used for client interpretation and recommendations.

public_context.label: Current public diner view
public_context.note: This reflects the current public town-market ranking asset and may differ from the wider operator intelligence report view.

2026-04.final_takeaway: Lambs is already a high-performing and publicly visible operator in the DayDine Stratford-upon-Avon market. The commercial priority is to protect visibility and strengthen evidence breadth: add a second authorised customer-platform source, improve the observed booking/contact path, and monitor the high-score cluster each month.
2026-04.commercial_readiness_gap: No fully confirmed direct booking/contact path
